About Me

Career Snapshot

I am a Computer Science undergraduate at Lovely Professional University with hands-on experience in Python, DSA, frontend development, and data visualization.

I am especially interested in Software Engineering with a growing focus on Cloud and DevOps because I enjoy building solutions that are not only functional, but also scalable, reliable, and easier to deploy.

My career goal is to become a Software Engineer who contributes to impactful products by combining strong problem-solving, clean development practices, and continuous learning.

My Work

Featured Projects

Highlighted projects showing hands-on work in data analysis, frontend development, and problem-solving.

📊

Excel Dynamic Data Visualization Dashboard

Developed an interactive dashboard to analyze and present data clearly using dynamic charts, formulas, and filters. The project focused on converting raw datasets into readable insights for faster decision-making.
Tools Used: Excel, PivotTables, Charts
Skills Demonstrated: Data analysis, dashboard design, reporting.

ExcelData VizPivotTablesApril 2025
🤖

Arduino Smart Car — Obstacle Detection

Built a smart car prototype that detects obstacles using ultrasonic sensors and responds in real time. The project combined embedded programming with hardware integration and testing.
Tools Used: Arduino, C/C++, Ultrasonic Sensor
Skills Demonstrated: Logic building, embedded systems, debugging.

ArduinoC/C++UltrasonicNov 2023
🌐

Amazon Clone — Frontend Bootcamp

Created a responsive e-commerce frontend inspired by Amazon with structured navigation, product sections, and cart-style UI components. The project strengthened practical frontend development and layout skills.
Tools Used: HTML, CSS, JavaScript
Skills Demonstrated: Responsive design, UI development, frontend implementation.

HTML5CSS3JavaScriptMarch 2024
🔢

DSA Visualizer — Algorithm Animations

Built a simple visualizer to explain sorting and searching concepts through step-by-step interaction. It was designed to improve understanding of core DSA topics while practicing clean logic implementation.
Tools Used: Python, DSA Concepts
Skills Demonstrated: Problem solving, algorithmic thinking, logical design.

PythonDSAAlgorithms2025
